description: A tall, narrow, open cabinet with an interior visible. The cabinet has a wooden exterior with a natural wood grain pattern. The interior features multiple shelves, also with a wood grain finish, against a plain white background. One door of the cabinet is open, revealing the interior shelves. The door itself has a contrasting design, with a distressed wood effect in lighter tones, giving it a rustic or weathered appearance. The overall design is minimalist and functional, emphasizing storage space within a compact footprint.
